clips.ko_desc: 여유로운 남자가 카페 의자에 천천히 기대며 미소 짓는 장면 (강한 첫 후킹)
clips.prompt: Cinematic slow push-in on a calm Korean man in his early 30s leaning back into a cafe chair with a subtle confident smile, warm golden light, shallow depth of field, gentle camera dolly forward, 6s, 16:9

clips.ko_desc: 한 명에게만 사람이 모이는 대비를 보여주는 빠른 컷
clips.prompt: Two Korean men in a warm cafe, soft focus pull revealing people naturally gravitating toward the calm one while the other stands alone, smooth rack focus, warm cinematic tone, 6s, 16:9

clips.ko_desc: 휴대폰 알림에도 평온한 표정 — '결과에 휘둘리지 않는' 비주얼 후킹
clips.prompt: Close-up of a Korean man calmly glancing at a buzzing phone then setting it down with a peaceful unbothered expression, subtle slow motion, warm light, shallow depth of field, 6s, 16:9

clips.ko_desc: 마주 앉은 남녀, 편안한 분위기로 끝맺는 인트로 마지막 클립
clips.prompt: A Korean man and woman talking comfortably across a cafe table, relaxed warm atmosphere, gentle ambient motion of steam rising from coffee, slow cinematic camera drift, 6s, 16:9

_note: from_image_id 가 있으면 해당 이미지로 image-to-video, 없으면 text-to-video 로 생성. 파이프라인의 --videos 옵션이 자동 처리.
